description_long: This is a single, delicate flower with a pale pink hue and a prominent central disc. The petals are numerous, narrow, and radiate outward in a dense, layered fashion, creating a full, rounded bloom. The petals exhibit a gradient of color, with deeper pinks near the center and lighter, almost white tips. The central disc is dark and slightly recessed, providing a striking contrast to the soft pastel petals. The flower is supported by a slender, greenish stem that appears smooth and slightly curved. No leaves are visible along the stem, emphasizing the solitary nature of the bloom.
description: A pale pink, full-petaled flower with a dark central disc and a slender green stem, featuring layered, radiating petals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, rounded bloom with densely layered pink petals and a visible dark center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flower's profile, the curvature of the stem, and the layered arrangement of petals.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view with the bloom facing forward, showing the petal layering and the stem's attachment.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the depth of the flower's center and the gentle bend of the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial pattern, forming multiple overlapping whorls around the central disc. The arrangement is highly symmetrical, with each petal slightly overlapping its neighbor, creating a layered, daisy-like appearance.
